name: UTIB INVL Technology
summary: UTIB INVL Technology is a principal investment firm. The firm primarily invests as a cluster of IT businesses with a focus in three areas, such as business climate improvement and e-governance, IT services and software, and cyber security. The firm typically invests in Northern and Eastern Europe, countries of Sub-Saharan Africa and South and Southeast Asia. The company was formerly known as BAIP Grupe AB. UTIB INVL Technology was founded in 2015 and is based in Vilnius, Lithuania.
